A drop-box for the whole team: every mem: A drop-box for the whole team: every member (and invited guests) can send files here via the bot. In the bot, use /settings to pick your default destination.
Add a second step at login: a code from: Add a second step at login: a code from an authenticator app, or a code the bot sends you on Telegram.
Add your bot to the channel as ADMINISTR: Add your bot to the channel as ADMINISTRATOR (it needs to post, edit and delete messages).
Alternative: send /id inside the channel: Alternative: send /id inside the channel — the bot answers with the ID.
Anyone with this link can access it.
Bot API endpoint (only for a local Bot A: Bot API endpoint (only for a local Bot API server)
Changing these re-validates the bot and: Changing these re-validates the bot and restarts the connection. The token is never shown back.
Custom encryption passphrase (optional —: Custom encryption passphrase (optional — auto-generated if empty)
Delete folder \"{name}\" and all its con: Delete folder "{name}" and all its contents? This cannot be undone.
Delete user \"{u}\" and all their files?: Delete user "{u}" and all their files?
Enter the 6-digit code from your authent: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
Exports the full database (settings, rol: Exports the full database (settings, roles, users, file index, shares). Optionally encrypt it with a passphrase (AES-256).
Files are encrypted (AES-256) on THIS ma: Files are encrypted (AES-256) on THIS machine before being sent to Telegram. Telegram only ever stores ciphertext.
Files sent to the bot land here. Move th: Files sent to the bot land here. Move them into your folders, or delete them.
How do I create a Telegram bot?: How do I create a Telegram bot?
How do I create the channel and find its: How do I create the channel and find its ID?
How long login sessions last on this TCl: How long login sessions last on this TCloud.
If enabled, anyone can create an account: If enabled, anyone can create an account from the login page.
In Telegram create a new PRIVATE channel: In Telegram create a new PRIVATE channel (e.g. “My TCloud Storage”). This is where your files will live.
Install version {v} now? TCloud will res: Install version {v} now? TCloud will restart.
Invite people WITHOUT an account to send: Invite people WITHOUT an account to send files to the bot — all you need is their Telegram @username. Note: Telegram bots cannot write first, so the guest has to open the bot and press Start (or just send a file).
Master switch for files sent to the bot.
Name: Name
No active shares. Use \"Share\" on a fil: No active shares. Use "Share" on a file or folder.
No files received yet. Send one to the b: No files received yet. Send one to the bot on Telegram.
Nothing in the shared TDrop yet.
OFF — chosen at setup. Files are stored: OFF — chosen at setup. Files are stored on Telegram as-is.
ON — files are encrypted (AES-256) on th: ON — files are encrypted (AES-256) on this machine before being sent to Telegram.
On iPhone/iPad: tap the Share button, th: On iPhone/iPad: tap the Share button, then "Add to Home Screen".
Open Telegram and search for @BotFather: Open Telegram and search for @BotFather (the official one, with the blue check).
Password is required for a new user: Password is required for a new user
Post any message in the channel, then fo: Post any message in the channel, then forward it to your bot in a private chat: the bot replies with the channel ID (starts with -100…).
Push an encrypted snapshot into the stor: Push an encrypted snapshot into the storage channel and pin it. "Restore from channel" rebuilds from the latest pinned snapshot.
Rebuild the database from the latest pin: Rebuild the database from the latest pinned channel snapshot? Current data will be replaced.
Replaces all current data. Telegram conn: Replaces all current data. Telegram connection settings on this instance are kept.
Send /newbot, choose a name and a userna: Send /newbot, choose a name and a username ending in “bot”.
Shared TDrop is not available for your a: Shared TDrop is not available for your account.
Storage channel ID (the bot must be an a: Storage channel ID (the bot must be an admin of it)
TCloud needs an internet connection to r: TCloud needs an internet connection to reach your Telegram storage. Please enable internet — without it TCloud cannot work.
This folder is empty. Upload a file or c: This folder is empty. Upload a file or create a folder.
This will REPLACE all current data. Cont: This will REPLACE all current data. Continue?
Update server unreachable. Your TCloud k: Update server unreachable. Your TCloud keeps working.
We sent a 6-digit code to your Telegram. Enter it to finish signing in.
We sent a code to your Telegram via the: We sent a code to your Telegram via the bot.
Your Telegram ID (optional — send /id to: Your Telegram ID (optional — send /id to your bot)
Your Telegram ID (send /id to the bot): Your Telegram ID (send /id to the bot)
Your personal cloud is up and running. T: Your personal cloud is up and running. TCloud is free and made with love — if it is useful to you, consider supporting the project.
waiting for the guest to /start the bot: waiting for the guest to /start the bot
Shown at the top of this folder — handy: Shown at the top of this folder — handy for context, reminders or instructions.
Give this folder its own color and icon: Give this folder its own color and icon to find it at a glance.
Add a note for this folder: Add a note for this folder
Scan this QR code with your authenticato: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Aegis, 1Password…), or add the secret by hand:
Uploaded images stay on this machine — n: Uploaded images stay on this machine — never sent to Telegram.
Uploaded ✓ — click Save appearance to ke: Uploaded ✓ — click Save appearance to keep it.
Let’s get your cloud running — it only t: Let’s get your cloud running — it only takes a minute.
Choose the interface language. You can c: Choose the interface language. You can change it later from your profile.
Bot @{u} is live — now send it /id (or p: Bot @{u} is live — now send it /id (or post /id inside your channel) to get the channel ID.
Your bot starts immediately — then you c: Your bot starts immediately — then you can send it /id (in a chat, or post /id inside your channel) to get the IDs you need next.
Choose a username and a password (min 4: Choose a username and a password (min 4 characters).
Recipients can preview the files but can: Recipients can preview the files but cannot download or upload.
Recipients can see and download everythi: Recipients can see and download everything inside, but cannot upload.
Recipients can see, download AND upload: Recipients can see, download AND upload their own files.
A drop-box: recipients can only upload —: A drop-box: recipients can only upload — they cannot see what is already inside.
Completely remove TCloud from this machi: Completely remove TCloud from this machine. Your files stay safe in your Telegram channel.
To remove your files too, delete the Tel: To remove your files too, delete the Telegram channel; to retire the bot, message @BotFather → /deletebot.
This stops the service and removes TClou: This stops the service and removes TCloud and its local data from this machine. Your files stay safe in your Telegram channel. This cannot be undone.
TCloud is shutting down and removing its: TCloud is shutting down and removing itself. Your files stay in your Telegram channel.
If a step needed root we could not get,: If a step needed root we could not get, finish it on the server with:
BotFather replies with a token like 1234: BotFather replies with a token like 123456:ABC… — paste it below. Keep it secret.
The owner has enabled a drop-box here.
Save uploads to a local folder and send: Save uploads to a local folder and send them to Telegram in the background — faster uploads, gentler on Telegram.
Max size of the staging folder (GB): Max size of the staging folder (GB)
When the server restarts for an update,: When the server restarts for an update, reload the app automatically so you get the new version.
